summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Salon Queue Management System - Multi-Salon Edition. Tested salon signup, OTP login, user booking flow, dashboard queue controls, theme toggle, and location-based salon discovery. Backend API tests: 19/22 passed (86%). Frontend flows all working correctly.

minor.issue: Duplicate phone registration allowed - test showed 200 instead of expected 400 for duplicate phone +919876543210. Phone format validation may need review.
Returns empty array for default salon - barbers not seeded properly. Booking works with 'Any Available' but specific barber selection unavailable.

integration_issues.issue: Only 'Any Available Barber' option shown because barbers collection is empty for default salon

issues: Amount shows Rs. 0 when 'Any Available' barber selected - pricing calculation requires specific barber selection

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix barber seeding - barbers collection is empty for default salon. Either drop barbers collection and restart backend, or manually seed barbers with correct salon_id (a74ba10b-27ad-4698-a4b5-02e535b90693)
Fix duplicate phone registration validation in /api/salon/register endpoint - currently allows duplicate registrations
Consider showing base prices when 'Any Available' barber is selected instead of Rs. 0
Add data-testid attributes to more form elements for better test automation
critical_code_review_comments: BARBER SEEDING ISSUE: Barbers were seeded with a different salon_id than current default salon. The initialize_data() function seeds barbers only if barber_count == 0, but uses the salon_id from the first salon found. If database was partially reset, barbers may reference old salon IDs.
Phone format validation inconsistent - some endpoints accept 10-digit, others require +91 prefix
Duplicate salon registration allowed - /api/salon/register should reject duplicate phone numbers but test showed it accepted duplicate +919876543210
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test salons and users with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-salon architecture working. OTP is hardcoded to 123456. Main issue is barbers not seeded - check initialize_data() function in server.py. All frontend flows tested and working. SMS OTP, WhatsApp notifications, and UPI payment verification are MOCKED.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp Notifications: Logged to console, not actually sent

features_tested.salon_signup_flow: PASS - Navigation from /salon/login to /salon/signup works, form submits correctly
features_tested.salon_otp_login: PASS - Send OTP, verify with 123456, redirects to dashboard
features_tested.salon_selection: PASS - List view shows all salons, Map view available
features_tested.booking_flow: PASS - Select salon, time slot, services, confirm booking, token generated
features_tested.dashboard_queue_controls: PASS - Call, notify, skip buttons work, status filters work
features_tested.theme_toggle: PASS - Dark/light mode toggle works on all pages
